source: ESO synthetic proxy (NOAA ONI fetch requires local run)

known_events.notes: Major drought and flood impacts globally.
First global coral bleaching event. Indonesia peat fires ~13-40% annual CO2. Peru fishery collapsed.
Third global bleaching event. 2.1 Gt C SE Asia fires. Great Barrier Reef 67% bleached.
Fourth global bleaching event confirmed (NOAA CRW).

note: Synthetic proxy for sandbox environment. Run backfill-elnino.py locally for live NOAA ONI data.
